name: Hydro Flare (Stage 1)
description: A rare dual-element entity born at hydrothermal vents in cosmic oceans. Its body maintains a steam equilibrium between scalding flames and liquid vapor.
originLore: Originating from sub-oceanic vents on frozen ocean worlds, Hydro Flare embodies the paradoxical harmony of scalding heat and liquid flow.

lore.celestialConcordance: Hydro Flare creates protective thermal mist clouds around cosmic hatcheries, shielding fragile organisms from void radiation.

quantumResonators.name: Scalding Vapor
quantumResonators.description: Projects a high-pressure jet of superheated steam that scalds foes.

quantumResonators.name: Fluid Shield
quantumResonators.description: Envelops itself in a boiling water barrier that repels kinetic impacts.
